ddls:
CREATE TABLE "interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intervention */,
  "intervention_name" TEXT /* Name of the intervention */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the intervention */,
  "administered_date" TEXT /* Date the intervention was administered */,
  "intervention_type" TEXT /* Type of the intervention */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Detailed methodology of the intervention */,
  "effectiveness_rating" REAL /* Effectiveness rating of the intervention */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Relevant medical history of the patient */,
  "current_medications" TEXT /* Current medications of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome record */,
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* ID of the intervention related to this outcome */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient associated with this outcome */,
  "assessment_period" TEXT /* Assessment period after the intervention (e.g., Immediately after, After 3 months, After 6 months) */,
  "improvement_level" TEXT /* Level of improvement (e.g., Significant Improvement, No Improvement) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the outcome */,
  "outcome_notes" TEXT /* Detailed notes about the outcome */,
  "next_assessment_date" TEXT /* Scheduled date for the next assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outcomes_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outcomes_intervention_id FOREIGN KEY ("intervention_id") REFERENCES interventions ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outcomes_improvement_level FOREIGN KEY ("improvement_level") REFERENCES improvement_levels ("level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outcomes_assessment_period FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_period") REFERENCES assessment_periods ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessment_periods" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment period */,
  "assessment_name" TEXT /* Name of the assessment period */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the assessment period */,
  "assessment_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the assessment period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "improvement_levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each improvement level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the improvement level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the improvement level */,
  "level_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the improvement level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "healthcare_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare provider */,
  "provider_title" TEXT /* Title of the provider (e.g., Dr., Nurse) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the provider */,
  "provider_specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the healthcare provider */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the provider */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provider_interventions" (
  "provider_intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provider-intervention relationship */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare provider */,
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* ID of the intervention administered by the provider */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the provider's administration of the intervention */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the provider's administration of the intervention */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_provider_interventions_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES healthcare_providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_provider_interventions_intervention_id FOREIGN KEY ("intervention_id") REFERENCES interventions ("intervention_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient giving feedback */,
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* ID of the intervention related to the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* The content of the feedback given by the patient */,
  "feedback_rating" REAL /* Rating given by the patient (e.g., satisfaction level) */,
  "follow_up_action" TEXT /* Actions taken based on the patient feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_feedback_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_feedback_intervention_id FOREIGN KEY ("intervention_id") REFERENCES interventions ("intervention_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* ID of the outcome being analyzed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was performed */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results or findings from the analysis */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used for the analysis */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations based on the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_outcome_id FOREIGN KEY ("outcome_id") REFERENCES outcomes ("outcome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the findings in the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., healthcare provider, admin) */,
  "user_email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
